  as={"h1"}

  children={"查询设备定义（设备详细信息）"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/definitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



查询设备定义（设备详细信息）

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"设备ID列表（当前一次最多支持10个设备ID）","schema":{"type":"array","maxItems":10,"items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"includeValues","in":"query","required":false,"description":"是否包含各 trait 的当前值（`value`）与上报时间（`time`）。默认 `false` 时仅返回能力定义元数据，结构与 `true` 相同但trait值value字段可能为空或是不准确的旧值；为 `true` 时会拉取设备的当前trait值。\n","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

responses={{"200":{"description":"成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型。"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本。","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称。"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表。"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointId","endpointName","deviceType","functions"],"properties":{"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点ID。"},"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"端点名称。"},"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"设备类型。"},"functions":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["functionCode"],"properties":{"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码（如 LevelControl, ColorControl, Output）。"},"traits":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["traitCode","parameter"],"properties":{"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"属性编码（如 parameter.type 解析）。","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"值更新时间（毫秒时间戳）。"}},"title":"Trait"}},"commands":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["commandCode"],"properties":{"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码（如
